tweet.full_text:
In southern India, robotic elephants are replacing live ones in Hindu rituals and festivals following concerns over animal abuse and fatal elephant rampages. But traditionalists who emphasize the sacredness of elephants are resisting the change.

Video by Rishi Lekhi https://t.co/pCcnBxvmJe
